title: ForesightX: The Future Has Signals. We Decode Them.
tagline: Stock market forecasting with deep time-series models.
impact: Built an end-to-end forecasting system over 1M+ market data points with automated retraining and 30% faster inference.
highlights: Feature-engineered forecasting pipeline for noisy financial signals
Automated evaluation, retraining, and drift checks
Deployment-focused optimization for low-latency serving

title: Deep ECG Signal Analysis
impact: Achieved 91.3% F1 on MIT-BIH/PTB benchmarks with near real-time inference under 150ms per segment.
highlights: Dual-model architecture for anomaly detection + rhythm classification
Custom ECG preprocessing and multi-label supervision
Inference path designed for clinical-style latency constraints

title: IntelliHire: AI-Driven Interviewer Platform
tagline: Adaptive AI interviews with resume-aware questioning and recruiter scoring.
impact: Built a full hiring workflow that generates dynamic interview rounds, stores candidate responses, and produces recruiter-ready scored reports.
highlights: Generated resume and JD-aware interview questions with adaptive difficulty
Implemented end-to-end candidate workflow: apply, schedule, interview, and review
Produced sortable performance reports with question-answer logs and scoring

title: Dynamic Resume Portfolio App
tagline: Resume-to-portfolio workflow with job match and deploy-ready public pages.
impact: Built a production-grade Next.js app with upload-edit-template-preview-deploy flow, autosave editing, and workflow-backed job match enhancement.
highlights: Implemented a step-based wizard from resume upload to portfolio deployment
Added split-screen live preview using a shared public portfolio renderer
Integrated n8n-first job match and resume enhancement with automatic fallback

title: BinSavvy: Smart Waste Management System
impact: Built a drone-assisted detection and routing workflow that streamlines waste monitoring and cleanup operations.
highlights: Drone image ingestion pipeline for field conditions
YOLO-based object detection integrated with backend workflows
Geo-mapped outputs to support operational decisions

title: MargDarshak-Mitr: Railway Travel Assistant
tagline: Coach tracking, food discovery, and trip planning.
impact: Developed a full-featured travel assistant web app focused on real-time utility and reliable fallback behavior.
highlights: Built coach tracking and trip planning flows end-to-end
Integrated public schedule and station datasets
Shipped user-focused interfaces for quick mobile usage

title: Student Lifestyle and Academic Performance Predictor
tagline: Predict GPA and stress levels using lifestyle signals.
impact: Built a 2,000-record data science pipeline with feature engineering, cross-validation, and regression modeling.
highlights: Structured preprocessing and feature engineering workflow
Compared Linear Regression, Random Forest, and SVR
Produced interpretable insights for stakeholder communication

title: Restaurant Data Analytics & Cuisine Popularity Prediction
impact: Implemented an end-to-end analytics and modeling pipeline with ~92% classification accuracy.
highlights: Processed and analyzed 10,000+ global restaurant records
Trained Random Forest and XGBoost models for cuisine popularity
Built trend visualizations for city-wise and rating-based insights

title: Chess Game - Two-Player Board Game
tagline: Interactive two-player chess with core mechanics.
impact: Strengthened software engineering fundamentals through object-oriented game-state modeling.
highlights: Implemented piece movement and turn-based game flow
Modeled board state and rule validation logic
